whyOpenThis: Start with the dashboard overview because it is the single best top-level entry point into counts, warnings, fit posture, and the main discovery surfaces.

entries.description: Primary generated case index across all fixtures and package paths.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the complete generated case inventory before drilling into audit surfaces.

entries.description: Compact discovery file for lightweight warning summary artifacts.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the lightweight warning-summary discovery path instead of the broader dashboard surface.

entries.description: Compact discovery file for fit-quality matrix and summary artifacts.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the compact fit discovery path without scanning the full audit index.

entries.description: Repo-level findings report for analogical and record-support fit posture.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want immediate case-level fit-risk findings from the dashboard layer.

entries.description: Compact case-first summary of fit findings severity and posture.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want a lighter fit findings view from the dashboard layer.

entries.description: Snapshot refresh sentinel showing whether generation is running or complete.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the current refresh state and timing without scanning the larger dashboard rollup.

entries.description: Broader discovery file for the full repo-level audit surface.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the broadest audit discovery path across trust, warning, source, and fit reports.

entries.description: Single-file dashboard rollup of case counts, trust posture, warnings, and discovery entry points.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this first when you want the strongest single top-level dashboard rollup before following linked surfaces.
